---
name: Design pressure test
about: Identify a specific failure mode in the design or governance
title: "[design] "
labels: design
---

## What part of the design

Link to the doc and section (e.g., `docs/governance.md` § Calibration, or `README.md` § What's open).

## The failure mode

What specific thing breaks? Be concrete. *"This calibration scheme fails when an adversary X under condition Y"* is what we want.

## Why it's load-bearing (or isn't)

Does the failure compromise something the project depends on, or is it a paper cut? Help us prioritize.

## Proposed direction (optional)

If you have one. We don't expect issue authors to also propose fixes, but if you have a concrete idea, say so.
